description_long: This is a rectangular box of Evergreen Multigrain Baked Crackers, featuring a predominantly white and light tan color scheme with soft orange accents. The front displays the brand name 'Evergreen Food Co.' above a large 'MULTIGRAIN' label, with an image of three square crackers below. The sides of the box provide additional branding, product pairing suggestions, and ingredient highlights, while the back features a nutrition facts panel, a description of the product, and a website link. The box is made of cardboard and is designed to be opened from the top. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and visually appealing, with subtle wheat graphics and tree silhouettes reinforcing the multigrain and natural theme.
description: A rectangular cardboard box of Evergreen Multigrain Baked Crackers, featuring wheat graphics, soft orange accents, and images of crackers on the front.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main branding, 'MULTIGRAIN' label, Evergreen logo, and an image of three crackers.
description_view_1: The left side view displays the Evergreen logo, a product pairing suggestion with hummus, and additional branding.
description_view_2: The back view features the nutrition facts panel, a product description, and subtle tree graphics.
description_view_3: The right side view highlights the product name, a list of ingredient claims, and another image of crackers.
attribute_brand_logo: The Evergreen Food Co. logo is visible on the front and both side panels, featuring a stylized tree and text in green and gray.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front and sides indicate 'Multigrain' as the flavor, with wheat graphics reinforcing the multigrain theme.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A nutrition facts panel is visible on the back, listing calories, serving size, and other nutritional information.
